evals.prompt: I just cloned this repo at ~/projects/gotk, can you summarize it so a future AI session has full context to make changes?
evals.expected_output: PROJECT_SUMMARY.md grounded in actual go files; small project so deep-dives optional

evals.prompt: Help me understand this codebase at ~/projects/design-system — I want to onboard another AI agent to make UI improvements.
evals.expected_output: PROJECT_SUMMARY.md + ui.md deep-dive; should detect TypeScript/UI library nature

evals.prompt: Generate project context for ~/projects/ctm so an agent can modify it later. It has a Go backend and a UI folder.
evals.expected_output: PROJECT_SUMMARY.md + likely architecture.md + ui.md + build-and-run.md; multi-component project
